allow_instructions: When BK says [RUN], auto-approve normal NC7 Studio.Fabric dev work in this repo unless a block rule matches.
Read-only shell is fine: ls, cat, head, tail, pwd, which, wc, grep, rg, find, test, hostname, whoami.
Git read is fine: git status, git diff, git log, git show, git branch, git rev-parse.
Git write in this repo is fine on [RUN]: git add, git commit (not push unless BK asked).
npm in this repo is fine: npm install, npm run dev, npm run build, vite build.
Vite dev on port 3010 is fine.
Edits under src/, public/, index.html, vite.config.js are fine.
Read-only browser MCP and open_resource for project files or localhost:3010 are fine.
WebFetch/WebSearch for docs (fabric.js, vite, npm, github) is fine.
block_instructions: Always ask before git push, git push --force, git reset --hard, git clean -fd, git rebase.
Always ask before reading or writing .env, credentials, secrets, or API keys.
Always ask before sudo, rm -rf, global installs, or changes outside this repo.
Always ask before editing AG-NC7-FoamArt-Studio (legacy Three.js production — cutover rule).
Always ask before destructive automation MCP without BK review.
